allow: PowerShell(Get-Process -Id \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName)

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { Stop-Process -Id $conn.OwningProcess -Force; Write-Host "Killed PID $\($conn.OwningProcess\)" } else { Write-Host "Port 3001 is free" })

PowerShell($content = Get-Content "d:\\studys\\shixi\\cp\\menumind\\scripts\\seed-recipes.ts" -Raw; $matches = [regex]::Matches\($content, 'tags:\\[\([^\\]]+\)\\]'\); $allTags = @\(\); foreach \($m in $matches\) { $tagsStr = $m.Groups[1].Value; $tagList = [regex]::Matches\($tagsStr, '"\([^"]+\)"'\); foreach \($t in $tagList\) { $allTags += $t.Groups[1].Value } }; $allTags | Group-Object | Sort-Object Count -Descending | Select-Object Count, Name)

PowerShell($content = Get-Content "d:\\studys\\shixi\\cp\\menumind\\scripts\\seed-recipes.ts" -Raw; $tagMatches = [regex]::Matches\($content, 'tags:\\[\([^\\]]+\)\\]'\); Write-Host "Total recipes with tags: $\($tagMatches.Count\)"; $allTags = @\(\); foreach \($m in $tagMatches\) { $tagList = [regex]::Matches\($m.Groups[1].Value, '"\([^"]+\)"'\); foreach \($t in $tagList\) { $allTags += $t.Groups[1].Value } }; Write-Host "Total tag instances: $\($allTags.Count\)"; $allTags | Group-Object | Sort-Object Count -Descending | ForEach-Object { "{0,4}  {1}" -f $_.Count, $_.Name })
